headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://apis.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
